@HujjatELC
Hai Chaliyan Chaliyan Shaam  - On The Path To Shaam
english translation text: HAI CHALIYAN CHALIYAN SHAAMON THE PATH TO SHAAMEnglish Transliteration
THE DEVASTATED SISTERS ARE ON THEIR WAY TO SHAAM
THE DAUGTHERS OF ZAHRA (s.a) ARE CHAINED AS THEY WALK PAST THE BODIES OF THEIR BROTHERS

EVERY BIBI HAS BID FAREWELL AND WALKED PAST THE BODY OF ABBAS (AS),
NOW THAT HE HAS GONE, SO HAS THEIR PRIDE AND JOY,
SHIMR HAS TAKEN AWAY THEIR VEILS.
THE PROPHET’S (SAW) DAUGTHERS WHO WERE RAISED IN THE PUREST HOUSEHOLD HAVE COVERED THEIR FACES WITH DUST.

THEY ENTER SHAAM WITH AN AILING PRISONER,
COVERING THEIR CHILDREN AND PROTECTING THEIR GRANDFATHER’S RELIGION.
WITH A BRUISED CHEEK, SAKINA (AS) CONSTANTLY TURNS AROUND TO LOOK AT HAZRAT ABBAS’ (AS) HEAD ON THE SPEAR.
THE ONE WHO WAS ILL AND WEAK CRIED 'HOW CAN I STOP MY TEARS OF BLOOD, WHEN I CAN SEE MY AUNTS STANDING IN THE COURT OF YAZID
